results.name: No provider available → fallback message

response.message: No providers found for this service.

results.assertion: Empty providers array + fallback message returned

results.name: Provider cancels after confirmation → auto-reschedule triggers

response.message: This slot was just booked by someone else! Here are the next available slots for this provider.

results.name: Misspelled/ambiguous input → clarification question fires

response.clarification_question: Maaf kijiye, mein aapki request samajh nahi paya. Aapko kis kism ki service chahiye aur kis location par?

results.assertion: Low confidence (0.10), clarification question generated in Roman Urdu

results.name: Two users book same provider simultaneously → double-booking prevention

response.message: This slot was just booked by someone else! Here are the next available slots for this provider.

results.assertion: First booking succeeded, second detected conflict and suggested alternatives

results.name: Price dispute after service → dispute agent decision tree runs

response.reason: Serious issue detected. Provider flagged, booking funds frozen. Escalated to human support.

results.assertion: Dispute escalated to human support, funds frozen
